variants.title: Filtrec RHR2600D20B/5 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR2600N20B/5
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR2600D20B/5 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR2600N20B/5
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR2600D20B/5. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR2600D20B/5 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Bypass Pressure: 0 bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0
